payload.review_text: Re-audit iteration 2 of PLAN-AA1: sufficient, 0 blockers, ready for plan-safety. All three iteration-1 findings resolved. S002 resolved (acceptance now parses the 'N tests collected' summary line; verified pytest 9.0.3 emits no '::' lines and the summary regex matches 111). S402 resolved (Step 3 rebuilds the full 8-file breakdown; Context corrected to live 111/8-file ground truth). H4 resolved (Context adds the collect-format note). Both new acceptance commands dry-run correctly: acceptance-2 matches '111 unit tests' and '111 tests covering'; acceptance-3 extracts per-file counts [14,10,29,8,9,16,9,16] summing to 111 == live collected. Cited symbols verified: DEFAULT_CONFIG (cli.py:27), find_completed_session (session.py:50), Transcribe.cmd (repo root). Non-blocker note: Step 3 prose says the executor should run pytest to derive counts, but the executor has no Bash — the PLAN's stated ground-truth numbers cover this and the parent-context acceptances re-derive authoritatively.

findings.message: Prior blocker resolved: acceptance now parses 'N tests collected' summary; verified live pytest 9.0.3 emits no '::' lines.
Prior blocker resolved: full 8-file breakdown rebuilt; Context corrected to live 111/8-file ground truth.
Prior advisory resolved: Context enumerates pytest 9.0.3 collect format and that the acceptance parses the summary line.
